data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁32
data.summary: [7/23 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[7/23 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Grand Assault and the transaction system.    

▶ Total number of players banned: 6 
📷 Period: Permanent 📷https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2608042

#BlueArhcive
